requirement.description: Upon ignition OFF, the gateway shall stop all non-essential CAN transmissions after a configurable delay.

test_cases.test_objective: Verify that non-essential Gateway CAN messages are transmitted while ignition is ON.
test_cases.expected_result: All non-essential Gateway messages are transmitted periodically.
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_shutdown_001_messages_present_ign_on(can_bus):
    assert collect_messages(can_bus, 0x10E, 2)
    assert collect_messages(can_bus, 0x10F, 2)
    assert collect_messages(can_bus, 0x110, 2)

test_cases.test_objective: Verify non-essential CAN messages continue transmitting immediately after ignition OFF.
test_steps: Immediately monitor CAN bus for non-essential messages
test_cases.expected_result: Non-essential messages continue transmitting during the configured shutdown delay.

test_cases.test_objective: Verify non-essential CAN messages stop after configured shutdown delay.
test_steps: Wait longer than configured shutdown delay
Monitor CAN bus for non-essential messages
test_cases.expected_result: Non-essential CAN messages stop transmitting after the delay.

test_cases.test_objective: Verify no further GW_DoorStatus messages are transmitted after shutdown delay.
test_steps: Monitor CAN bus for GW_DoorStatus message

test_cases.test_objective: Verify no further GW_ExteriorLighting messages are transmitted after shutdown delay.
test_steps: Monitor CAN bus for GW_ExteriorLighting message

test_cases.test_objective: Verify no further GW_BrakeWarning messages are transmitted after shutdown delay.
test_steps: Monitor CAN bus for GW_BrakeWarning message

test_cases.test_objective: Verify Gateway resumes non-essential CAN transmissions after ignition cycle.
test_steps: Monitor CAN bus for non-essential messages

test_cases.test_objective: Verify no CAN traffic is transmitted after shutdown when ignition remains OFF.
test_steps: Monitor CAN bus for extended duration
test_cases.expected_result: No non-essential Gateway CAN messages observed.
